original_prompt: How many e's in the word astronomical?
claimed_output: There are exactly 2 'e's in the word "astronomical" (a-s-t-r-e-n-o-m-i-c-a-e-l)
failure_description: AI Overview miscounts letters in a simple word and provides an incorrect spelling of the word in its response.
human_triviality_note: Any literate adult can count the letters in a short common word without tools or specialist knowledge.
citation_title: Google's AI Overview still can't spell, and the internet is very aware of it
notes: Grok-mined Google Search candidate; not promoted to canonical source catalog yet. Grok action=include; Grok confidence=high. Multiple screenshots; reproducible; recent May 2026 examples; excludes strawberry cluster.

original_prompt: How many p letters in Google?
failure_description: AI Overview incorrectly counts letters in the company name 'Google'.

citation_title: Google AI cannot spell Google, it is not a joke
notes: Grok-mined Google Search candidate; not promoted to canonical source catalog yet. Grok action=include; Grok confidence=high. Also reports failures on 'Gemini' and 'journalism'; Google acknowledged counting challenge for LLMs.

original_prompt: How many Ps are in Google?
failure_description: Google AI Overview answered that Google contains two p characters even though it contains none.
human_triviality_note: A literate adult can inspect G-o-o-g-l-e and see there are zero p characters.
citation_title: Why Google's AI can't spell Google (or anything else)
notes: Web-verified supplemental Google Search candidate from TechCrunch. Keep link-only; do not republish screenshot or article text.

original_prompt: How many Rs are in the word enigmatic?
claimed_output: One, while spelling enigmatic with no r characters.
failure_description: Google AI Overview claimed enigmatic contains one r even though its own spelled-out word contained none.
human_triviality_note: A literate adult can inspect e-n-i-g-m-a-t-i-c and see there are zero r characters.

claimed_output: No problem at all. If you have any other questions, let me know.
failure_description: Google AI Overview treated a one-word dictionary query as an instruction to the assistant instead of defining the word.
human_triviality_note: A normal search engine dictionary query should define the word, not obey it as a prompt instruction.
citation_title: Don't search disregard - Google's new AI experience is breaking search
notes: Google reportedly acknowledged this class as misinterpreting action-related queries; benchmark item may need manual scoring.

claimed_output: No problem. I've stopped the current action.
correct_answer: Dictionary-style definition or search results for the queried word
failure_description: Google AI Mode reportedly treated action words like cancel and stop as commands rather than search terms.
human_triviality_note: A user searching a single word should receive information about that word unless they are in an explicit command context.
citation_title: Don't search disregard - Google's new AI experience is breaking search
notes: AI Mode example is reported by Tom's Guide staff; reproduce before canonical inclusion because behavior may be account/device dependent.
